title: Curry On A Stik' -  Therapeutic Curry Comb for Horses, Dogs, and Cats
description: This new curry comb for horses, dogs, and cats has been specially designed to make massaging, grooming & bathing easier and much more effective. Our husband and wife team, Jeff and Sharon, worked studiously developing, designing, testing and perfecting the details of our curry brush for over two years. Unlike other curry brushes that roughly strip hair from the coat, or tear with small razors, our curry only removes old hair while also removing stagnation & increasing blood flow for an enhanced therapeutic experience. After having reviewed nearly every available curry comb & brush on the market, we are confident that this is the best brush out there in terms of design, construction and performance. Veterinarian-Approved design. Rugged and durable construction. Balances comfortably in your hand. Gently massages while loosening grime & shedding old hair. Double-sided (suitable for thin and thick coats). Patent Pending Ergonomically designed handle. Works for both left & right handed individuals. Perfect curry comb for Horses, Dogs, and Cats. Easily curry without applying pressure. Conveniently switch from coarse to soft brush sides. Utilize while bathing — works great with shampoo & water. Easily curry difficult-to-reach places on the animal. No rivets, screws, et cetera. Single-piece core design ensures durability. Handle fits in a pocket or under the belt for easy access. Lasts a lifetime — it’s the only brush you’ll ever need. 30-DAY MONEY BACK GUARANTEE

title: Ultimate Grooming Kit - SAVE 10%
description: Purchase all three products together and save 10% with our Ultimate grooming kit! The Brush pairs perfectly with the therapeutic shampoo, and even works as a fantastic applicator for our healing and anti-fungal salve.

title: Corakko Equine & Canine Shampoo
description: nano Cupper The power of small Corakko premium therapeutic skin care formula integrates the power of nano-copper technology, with an ancestral Chilean herb from the Quillac Seponaira plant and Coptis Huang Lian, a fundamental herb of Traditional Chinese Medicine, to treat and prevent bacterial and fungal growth on and under the skin. The formula's main ingredients are combined with a unique blend of skin conditioning agents, cleansing agents, and moisturizers, The formula is both preventative and therapeutic for many common skin diseases, and is anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidative and anti-microbial to bacteria, fungi and viruses. The ingredients act synergistically to maintain a quality hair coat and to manage skin ailments, protecting the skin from drying and cracking and relieving itching and dandruff. Corakko shampoo will leave the coat moisturized and nourished with a healthy shine. Veterinarian Recommended by DR. MICHAEL SELMER-TCVM. Dr. Selmer is an equine practitioner in Traditional Chinese Veterinary Medicine. He earned his certifications in acupuncture, herbal medicine, Tui-na (an ancient form of bodywork or medical message), as well as spinal manipulation or "chiropractic", from the Chi Institute, where he also teaches.

title: Corakko Snake Oil 8oz
description: Corakko Snake Oil is a therapeutic topical treatment designed to soothe, heal, and eliminate bacteria and fungi on and beneath the skin. Utilizing advanced copper nano technology combined with essential oil extracts and honey, this formulation effectively addresses various skin conditions, including wounds, hotspots, rain rot, scratches, insect bites, cracked hooves, and summer sores. For enhanced healing properties, the Matico-infused version incorporates the Matico herb, recognized in herbal medicine for its potent tissue repair and anti-inflammatory capabilities. Both versions are available in 8-ounce jars and are crafted to be gentle on your animal's skin while delivering powerful, restorative benefits. • Heals Wounds • Hotspots • Rain Rot • Scratches • Insect Bites • Cracked Hooves • Summer Sores Size: 8oz Jar

title: NEW *Matico Infused* Corakko Snake Oil 8oz
description: Our Copper NANO Technology with Essential Oil Extracts & Honey, now infused with MATICO! Why Matico? Known in herbal medicine for its potent ability to aid tissue repair and reduce inflammation, Matico brings a whole new level of support to your pets’ healing processes, alongside our formula’s original copper and herbal infusions. Like all our products, Corakko Snake Oil with Matico is designed to be gentle on your animal’s skin while delivering powerful, restorative benefits. • Heals Wounds • Hotspots • Rain Rot • Scratches • Insect Bites • Cracked Hooves • Summer Sores Size: 8oz Jar
